objective: Implement RFC 0001 Proposal 2 — external watchlist finding-generator emitting sidecar candidates with status=proposed, requires=["human-review"]; held by IsQueueItemHeldForReview from commit 0dc6b7f3.
done_criteria: Status/Requires/DedupKey fields propagate end-to-end from sidecar candidate to next-work.jsonl line
external-watchlist| dedup_key prefix preserved by normalizeGeneratorCandidate (Pre-mortem Fix #1 regression guard)
Resulting queue items return false from rpi.IsQueueItemSelectable
External watchlist generator soft-fails on context cancellation
Lane-level fitness counter (external_watchlist_emitted) visible on IngestResult after a run with stale entries

waves.name: Propagation plumbing + Fix #1 normalize prefix preservation
Register generator in INGEST + PROGRAM.md scope
